case_title: GASPARYAN, ALEXASNDER vs. JIM'S AUTO BODY et al

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-30-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), CONTINUED FROM THE 12/30/96 STAT. OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-15-1997, CONTINUED TO FEB-04-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 FOR ORDER TO PUBLISH NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
